data.body:
Shouta sighs. “How bad is he?”

Recovery Girl taps her cane. “Poor pup probably hasn’t slept or kept anything down for a while. His temperature was pretty high, but I got some medicine in him and hooked him up to an IV. I haven’t seen a drop this bad in a while.”
data.author: did:plc:vyhlsfbrgdam2l5jdafhlkpw

data.body: Recovery Girl is by Bakugou’s bedside, hands on her hips, and a disapproving look on her face. Bakugou is pouting, poking at his bento. Recovery Girl sighs when she sees Shouta, gesturing for him to come forward. “Shouta, tell this boy that he needs more rest. He cannot go back to class so soon!”
data.author: did:plc:vyhlsfbrgdam2l5jdafhlkpw

data.body: Bakugou doesn’t answer, and Shouta can tell he’s uncomfortable. He hesitantly moves closer, an idea coming to mind. Stressed pups always respond well to scenting and close contact. Shouta is willing to do anything to make this easier on his student.
data.author: did:plc:vyhlsfbrgdam2l5jdafhlkpw

data.body: It wasn’t his fault I responded that way. None of this is his fault. I may have blamed him at first, but he did nothing wrong. He was just doing what I asked him to. I shouldn’t respond like that to someone I trust. I’m all fucked up because of that piece of shit.”
data.author: did:plc:vyhlsfbrgdam2l5jdafhlkpw

data.body: Way ahead of you!
data.author: did:plc:dzd4qq4d7e3n7aqtprwzqunk

data.body:
Shouta can tell he’s exhausted from recounting what had happened. He rewards him with a few pets, rumbling a little to comfort him.

“Thank you for telling me. I know that was hard.”

Bakugou nuzzles into his neck again. “Yeah, yeah. M’ sure you already heard it from Deku.”
